profile.coreProblem: Your attention is being drained before your real priorities ever get a chance.
profile.identityShift: Start acting like someone who trains, recovers, and eats on purpose rather than by accident.
profile.fastestWin: Building self confidence will create fast spillover into energy, standards, posture, and follow-through.
next72Hours: Today: Turn your 15-minute daily reset into a training block: move daily, track protein, and keep your environment pointed at better choices.
Tonight: Cut screen drag first: charge your phone away from your bed, set one app limit, and create a nightly no-scroll window.
Within 72 hours: lock in one repeatable daily standard and track it with a visible checkmark.
weekOneChecklist: Protect a 15-minute deep-focus block every day.
Move your phone out of the room for one key block each day.
Keep one visible promise every day so confidence has proof to build from.
profile.headline: Body and confidence track: 60/100
profile.summary: You already have enough self-awareness to build momentum fast if you simplify and follow through.
plan: Turn your 15-minute daily reset into a training block: move daily, track protein, and keep your environment pointed at better choices.
Cut screen drag first: charge your phone away from your bed, set one app limit, and create a nightly no-scroll window.
Build momentum with tiny wins: one promise, one checkmark, one repeatable action that proves you can trust yourself again.
